title: Cryptool partners with Web3Port to fast-track early Web3 fundraising
content_html:
Cryptool today announced a partnership with Web3Port, a matchmaking protocol that connects Web3 start-ups with contributors and capital.

The collaboration is designed to shorten the path from idea to funded project. For founders, it means quicker access to the right backers. For contributors, it opens up a curated pipeline of teams that are ready to build.

The partnership also adds practical fundraising support behind every project Web3Port introduces, including help structuring rounds and onboarding investors.

This is the first of a series of partnerships Cryptool is putting in place ahead of its platform launch.
author: Cryptool
